title: Household 4PK Insect Mosquito Fly Ribbon Sticky Tape - No Mess, No Vapors
description:
Are you sick of pesky flies and other insects in your house? Then you need a set of PIC Fly Ribbons. Our fly ribbons are an effective way to control common horse flies, houseflies, moths, and other insects both indoors and out. These ribbons can be used in your barn, garage, porch or food preparation areas. The PIC fly ribbons are super easy to use. Just warm the tube in your hands if it is very cold to facilitate removal of the ribbon. Remove the thumbtack and place it in a secure position for later use. Hold the red loop and pull down the tube slowly with a twirling motion until the ribbon is fully exposed. Once exposed, hang the ribbon by placing the thumbtack through the red loop and place anywhere flies are a nuisance

Household 4PK Insect Mosquito Fly Ribbon Sticky Tape - No Mess, No Vapors

Are you sick of pesky flies and other insects in your house? Then you need a set of PIC Fly Ribbons.

Key Features

  • SUPER EASY TO USE - These fly ribbons will start working right out of the box. Just remove the ribbon, hang with the included thumbtack and place anywhere flies are a nuisance.
  • SAFE FOR INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE - PIC fly traps can be used in barns, garages, porches or food preparation areas. They do not contain any vapors or poisons.
  • LONG LASTING - Our fly traps are designed to attract pests for up to 3 months. For maximum results, replace the traps every 3 months.
  • TRUSTED PIC BRAND - You can count on PIC fly traps to get the job done. Our ribbons attract and traps flying insects without using harmful sprays or vapors.
  • 4 PACK SET - Each box comes with 4 fly ribbons, so you can start controlling pests in multiple areas. They are effective against common houseflies, horse flies, moths and more.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: PC4PKFRIB
  • UPC: 072477580699
  • Color: Yellow
  • Size: 4 Pack

Our fly ribbons are an effective way to control common horse flies, houseflies, moths, and other insects both indoors and out. These ribbons can be used in your barn, garage, porch or food preparation areas.

The PIC fly ribbons are super easy to use. Just warm the tube in your hands if it is very cold to facilitate removal of the ribbon. Remove the thumbtack and place it in a secure position for later use. Hold the red loop and pull down the tube slowly with a twirling motion until the ribbon is fully exposed. Once exposed, hang the ribbon by placing the thumbtack through the red loop and place anywhere flies are a nuisance.

PIC fly ribbons will become even more effective after the first few flies are caught. Since flies are sensitive to temperature, light, and humidity, these ribbons work great close to windows. Replace the traps every 3 months for the best results.
